name: sidecar
description: Claude Code plugin pack with strict concept separation. Top-level dirs: hooks/ (PreToolUse·SessionStart auto-behavior), commands/ (/slash-command invoked), skills/ (Skill tool invocable). 1 plugin = 1 concept; no mixing.

plugins.name: commons
plugins.description: SessionStart + PreCompact hook — injects a cross-project common do/dont layer above the per-project context.

plugins.name: inbox
plugins.description: Cross-project handoff inbox — skill (natural language) + /inbox list / new <kind> <slug> for filing inbox/<kind>/<slug>.md entries in the current repo.

plugins.name: hexa-lsp
plugins.description: Wire the hexa-lang LSP server (`hexa lsp`) for `.hexa` files. Minimal: only `.hexa` claimed.

plugins.name: git-guard
plugins.description: PreToolUse(Bash) deny for force-push · force-with-lease · refspec-force · git {commit,merge,rebase} --no-verify. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_GIT_GUARD=1.

plugins.name: all-bg-go
plugins.description: Parallel fan-out trigger — when the previous assistant turn offered multiple branches/options and the user says 'all bg go' (or equivalent), spawn one background Agent per branch in parallel instead of picking one. Skill (natural language) + /all-bg-go command.
